violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Shelves behind the bar are lined with dish cloths.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Ceiling in the kitchen is in need of repair. Starting to crack and fall down. Small wall area by the handwash sink in need of repair.

Cooling of potentially hazardous food. — --Cooling of potentially hazardous food was not accomplished using proper methods. -Large container of pulled pork in the cold hold prepared the day before was at 55 F and needed to be discarded.
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Food display protection, condiment protection, clean tableware usage, sign posted (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
